name: track
description: Track CLI and JJ workspace task management skills for AI agents

interface.shortDescription: JJ workspace task management for agents
interface.longDescription: Manage development tasks with track CLI and JJ workspaces. Skills are split by workflow phase: setup, execute, and advanced patterns. Agents read track status --json and follow workflow.next_action.
defaultPrompt: Use $track and run track status --json first, then follow workflow.next_action.
Use $track-task-execute to continue implementing the current track TODO.
Use $track-task-setup to create a new track task with repos and TODOs.
